h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned, prefixed with hierarchical section numbering (e.g., 9.5.)
h1.example_text: 9.5. Adapting to the New Normal: Changing Business Models

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, centered above figures, prefixed with 'Figure' and numbering
h2.example_text: Figure 9.4.1: Challenges in importing amongst tourism MSMEs who import – all survey phases (%)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers located in the bottom-left corner; footnotes positioned at the bottom of the page below a horizontal separator line.
